revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
See my summary on my edit to sandbox.

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disputed_section here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disputed_section for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B=
<!--{{Disputed section}} begin-->
{{Disputed
 | {{{1|}}}
 | what  = section
 | date  = {{{date|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | talk  = {{{talkpage|{{{talk|{{{discuss|{{{1|Disputed}}}}}}}}}}}}
}}
<!--{{Disputed section}} end-->
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disputed_section for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B=

{{Disputed
 | {{{1|}}}
 | what  = section
 | date  = {{{date|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | talk  = {{{talkpage|{{{talk|{{{discuss|{{{1|Disputed}}}}}}}}}}}}
}}

}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}

</noinclude>
